design_philosophy: A minimalist, clean, and elegant layout optimized for smartphones. Captures the essence of handmade crafts using earthy tones, soft shadows, and a Pinterest-style masonry grid for an immersive visual experience.

rules.brand_logo: text-2xl font-serif font-bold text-[#2E5339] flex items-center gap-2

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Masonry grid using CSS columns (e.g., columns-2 md:columns-3 lg:columns-4 xl:columns-5 gap-4 md:gap-6). Items must use 'break-inside-avoid mb-4 md:mb-6'.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main images, rounded-full for avatars and filters, rounded-xl for buttons.

header.style: Sticky at top, background 'glass' (backdrop-blur-xl), subtle bottom border. Must contain Brand Name ('Cuore Artigiano' with Heart icon in Verde Foresta) on left, Google Login button on right.

category_filters.style: Horizontally scrollable flex container (no scrollbar). Pill-shaped buttons. Inactive: border border-light, text-muted. Active: bg-[#2E5339] text-white shadow-soft.

masonry_item.wrapper: break-inside-avoid mb-6 flex flex-col gap-3 group relative cursor-pointer
masonry_item.image: w-full h-auto object-cover rounded-2xl transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-[1.02]
masonry_item.overlay_actions: Absolute positioning over image on hover (Desktop) or always visible/accessible (Mobile). Includes 'Contatta' (WhatsApp) and 'Condividi'.
masonry_item.footer: Flex row, items-center gap-3 mt-2. Left: 32px rounded-full avatar. Right: Artisan brand name.

artisan_profile.layout: Hero section centered: Large avatar (120px), Brand Name (h1), Bio (max-w-2xl text-center). Followed by 'Contatta l'Artigiano' CTA button. Divider, then Masonry Grid of their works.

buttons.primary: bg-[#749274] hover:bg-[#648064] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all duration-200
buttons.google_auth: Flex items-center gap-2 bg-white border border-light text-[#4A3018] rounded-full px-5 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-[#F9F6F0]

icons.library: lucide-react and react-icons/fa (for FaWhatsapp and FaGoogle)

usage.logo: Heart icon next to 'Cuore Artigiano', colored Verde Foresta (#2E5339)

masonry_items.description: A colorful bag filled with yarn
Wind chimes hanging from a tree branch
white and black floral round ornament

avatars.usage: Profile picture for Ceramiche di Luna
Profile picture for Intrecci di Filo

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in pure React + Tailwind CSS. Use Vite/React setup with .jsx/.js files.
IMPORTANT: Keep all text exclusively in Italian ('Cuore Artigiano', 'Cerca...', 'Accedi con Google', 'Contatta l\'Artigiano', 'Condividi', etc.).
Install and use `react-icons` for FaWhatsapp, FaGoogle, etc. Install `lucide-react` for standard UI icons like Share, Heart.
Implement the masonry grid using Tailwind CSS multi-column layout (`columns-2 md:columns-3 xl:columns-4 gap-6`) or a library like `react-masonry-css`.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive and key informational elements (e.g., `data-testid='filter-button-orecchini'`, `data-testid='contact-artisan-button'`).
Implement Google Auth layout/UI (mock the actual integration if backend isn't ready).
WhatsApp button should use a predefined link like `https://wa.me/...?text=Ciao...` or simulate it visually.
The application is display-only. Do not add any cart or payment functionality.
Follow the specific color palette precisely: Background Cream (#F9F6F0), details Sage Green (#749274), Logo/Active Forest Green (#2E5339), and Text Chocolate Brown (#4A3018).
Make sure to import Google Fonts 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' in index.html or index.css.
